title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Gaurs Group Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Gaurs Group Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Gaurs Group Advisory Limited are looking for an experienced Sales Manager based out of Gwalior. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Gaurs Group Advisory Limited:
Gaurs Group Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Property Valuation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gaurs Group Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
